Author: Noodlefu
Name: Party Parses
Punchline: Shows your party/raid/alliance's best FFLogs parse for the duty you're currently in.
Description: Looks up your current party, alliance, or raid group and shows each member's best FFLogs parse for the dungeon/trial/raid you're currently inside. Requires a free FFLogs API v2 client (client ID + secret) configured in the settings window.
